name: Jaydes
description:
'''Jayden Yen Dumont''' (born February 24, 2006), known professionally as '''Jaydes''' (stylized in all [[lowercase]]), is an American rapper, singer-songwriter, and record producer. He gained popularity in the [[2020s underground rap]] scene from social media and [[Music streaming service|streaming platforms]] such as [[TikTok]] and [[SoundCloud]]. 

Born and raised in [[Pompano Beach, Florida]], Dumont began writing and releasing music to [[SoundCloud]] under his [[pseudonym]] Evvls after he had switched to [[Online school|online learning]] in high school. He is credited with the support of the popularization of the [[Plugg music|PluggnB]] genre in 2021. He  signed with [[10K Projects]] in 2022, and released his third [[extended play]] (EP) ''[[Heartpacing]]'' in August of that same year.
